name: accounting firms managing 10-20 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10-20 clients, manual depreciation calculations cause compliance risks. We automate depreciation calculations instead of spreadsheets and manual tracking.
problem_solved: Manual depreciation calculations lead to errors and compliance risks.
